response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, and deep systems expertise in event-driven architectures and distributed systems, but lacks clear evidence of leading AI systems at scale in regulated fintech environments, managing teams beyond 10 people, or designing multi-agent frameworks with financial risk integration — key requirements for a CTO role.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic workflows and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven track record in event-driven, distributed systems across multiple domains
Strong engineering culture advocacy with TDD, CI/CD, and open-source contributions
concerns: No demonstrable experience leading engineering teams of 30+ or building senior technical leadership layers
Lacks explicit evidence of AI systems deployed in regulated fintech (credit, liquidity, compliance)
No clear record of architecting model-agnostic, production-grade multi-agent systems with feedback loops
